plan_history.intent_description: Resolve routing loop/blackhole: 192.168.0.12 cannot reach 172.16.0.12 because R1 and R3 have mutual static routes for 172.16.0.0/24 pointing at each other; after remediation, traffic from 192.168.0.12 to 172.16.0.12 should follow a correct path (no mutual static next-hops).
plan_history.problem: Mutual static routes on router1 and router3 for 172.16.0.0/24 (each pointing at the other) create a forwarding loop/blackhole, preventing reachability to 172.16.0.12.
plan_history.fix_summary: Remove the incorrect static route on router3 that points 172.16.0.0/24 at router1 (next-hop 10.0.0.10). Risk: traffic to 172.16.0.0/24 may be temporarily unreachable until a correct route to the network (via router2) is installed or router2 is confirmed reachable. Assumption: router2 is the correct path to 172.16.0.0/24 and will be handled separately if needed.
